posts.title: Strengthening Singapore’s AI Future: A New National Partnership
posts.summary: Google DeepMind and Singapore partner to apply frontier AI to address complex challenges across health, education, and sustainability and more.

posts.title: Finding the molecular switches behind new infectious diseases
posts.summary: Clare Bryant uses Co-Scientist to identify genetic triggers in emerging infectious diseases.

posts.title: Opening new paths in aging research
posts.summary: Calico Life Sciences uses Co-Scientist to connect scattered findings and generate new leads in aging research.

posts.title: Accelerating discovery of liver disease mechanisms
posts.summary: Filippo Menolascina uses Co-Scientist to identify new liver disease treatments and explain why existing drugs only help certain patients.

posts.title: Uniting biological toolkits for a new approach to ALS
posts.summary: Co-Scientist unites Boston Children’s Hospital and MIT’s labs to explore new RNA-based treatments for ALS.

posts.title: Uncovering repurposed medicines to fight liver fibrosis
posts.summary: Stanford geneticist uses Co-Scientist to help find new treatments for chronic liver disease and liver fibrosis.

posts.title: How WeatherNext helped the National Hurricane Center better predict Hurricane Melissa’s historic landfall in Jamaica
posts.summary: Learn how our WeatherNext AI model help forecasters give communities unprecedented time to prepare ahead of the historic Hurricane Melissa.
